remarks: Build your dream estate on 4+ private, level acres in the heart of backcountry Greenwich, surrounded by multi-million-dollar homes and just minutes from top transportation and amenities. The site is truly ready to build: the previous structure and all underground oil and water tanks have been removed. Enjoy exceptional access with Westchester County Airport, Million Air, and Blade only 6 minutes away for private aviation and helicopter service to Manhattan or the Hamptons. White Plains Metro-North is 15 minutes away with a 37-minute express ride to Grand Central. Walk to Tamarack Country Club. Short drive to nearby tennis clubs, two Equinox locations, the Hemlock Gorge Audubon Sanctuary and Greenwich Audubon Center. A rare chance to create a custom estate in Greenwich.
